summary: Gwangjin 을 was a notable 2020 race: 고민정 (DPK) 50.37% vs 오세훈 (UFP, current Seoul mayor) 47.82%. Oh Se-hoon's narrow loss here preceded his successful 2021 mayoral by-election win. 광진 갑 was less competitive (전혜숙 53.68).

issues.label: 오세훈 ran in 광진 을
issues.description: Oh Se-hoon's narrow loss was a notable 2020 result; he returned to win Seoul mayor 11 months later.

issues.label: Pro-Moon wave context
issues.description: Even high-profile UFP candidate couldn't overcome DPK wave in 광진 을.
